properties.displayName: Block the creation of 'FREE F1' SKU for App Service Plan
properties.description: Azure App Service Plan should use the Basic or Premium SKU.
nonComplianceMessages: Azure App Service Plan SKU configuration does not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: Azure App Service Plan should use the Basic or Premium SKU. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
